title: chamaecrista capensis
intro: Chamaecrista capensis, also known as sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it beneficial for reducing pain and inflammation in the body. Chamaecrista capensis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used as a topical application to treat skin irritations and wounds.
